extracted_from: Episode titles + descriptions (transcripts are PO-token-walled; the hook DNA lives in the titles regardless)
hard_rule: STRUCTURE ONLY. These are abstracted skeletons — slot templates, never TBOY's wording, metaphors, or headlines. The render step fills every slot in 100% original words.
narrative_arc: HOOK: a bold, concrete claim that front-loads the stakes (a number, a name, or a consequence)
MECHANISM: the one surprising move or rule that explains how the claim is true
TAKEAWAY: a single repeatable line the reader can carry into a conversation

hook_patterns.name: speculative_stakes
hook_patterns.when_to_use: A small/cheap move implies an outsized outcome. Forces the reader to ask 'how?'
hook_patterns.slot_notes: Consequence must be specific and big (a title, a market, a number), never vague.

hook_patterns.name: transformation_metaphor
hook_patterns.skeleton: How [Company] turned into [vivid metaphor for what it really is now]
hook_patterns.when_to_use: The company's stated identity diverges from its actual economic engine.
hook_patterns.slot_notes: Metaphor reframes the business model in one image. Must be falsifiable, not cute.

hook_patterns.name: contrarian_why
hook_patterns.when_to_use: A respected operator made a move that looks wrong on the surface.
hook_patterns.slot_notes: The payoff is the hidden rationale, not the action itself.

hook_patterns.name: single_rule
hook_patterns.when_to_use: Cuts through noise/hype with a single decision heuristic.
hook_patterns.slot_notes: The rule must actually be load-bearing, not a platitude.

hook_patterns.name: spend_to_goal
hook_patterns.when_to_use: A large, specific spend reveals a non-obvious priority.
hook_patterns.slot_notes: The number anchors; the goal reframes what the spend was really for.

hook_patterns.name: headline_hidden_cause
hook_patterns.when_to_use: The reported reason and the real reason differ.
hook_patterns.slot_notes: Colon split: surface event, then the subtext. This IS the Subtext shape.

segment_structure.open: Lead with the subtext, not the recap. Assume the reader saw the headline.
segment_structure.body: 1-2 lines of story context, then the load-bearing tradeoff. No padding.
segment_structure.close: One takeaway line. Repeatable, forwardable, falsifiable.

voice_markers: Active voice; short declaratives for the reveal
Banned: buzzword soup, 'in today's fast-paced AI-driven world' energy
